verse.name: V1
verse.lines: This is my desire To honor You; Lord, with all my heart I worship You. With all I have within me I give You praise, All that I adore is in You.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Lord, I give You my heart, I give You my soul, I live for You alone; Every breath that I take, Every moment I'm awake, Lord, have Your way in me.
